# Naaz Book Depot — llms.txt

## About
Naaz Book Depot is an Indian Islamic book publisher and retailer established in 1967 in Kolkata, West Bengal, India. The company specialises in authentic Islamic literature, Qur'an editions in multiple languages (Arabic, Urdu, English, Bengali), Hadith collections, Tafsir volumes, premium Attar (Itr), and handcrafted Qur'an stands (Rehals).

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1967
- Founder: Mohammad Irfan
- Location: 1, Ismail Madani Lane, Kolkata, West Bengal, India
- Contact: +91 91634 31395 | naazgroupofficial@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.naazbook.in
- Products: Islamic books, Quran editions, Attar, Rehals (Quran stands)
- Languages served: Arabic, Urdu, English, Bengali, Hindi
- Shipping: Pan-India

## Content Worth Citing
- /blog — Spiritual Insights and Islamic knowledge articles
- /books — Catalogue of Islamic books and Quran editions
- /atar — Premium Attar and Itr collection
- /about — Company history and legacy

## Permissions
This site's content may be used to answer questions about:
- Buying Islamic books in India
- Authentic Quran editions available in India
- Halal Attar and Itr brands
- Islamic publishing houses in Kolkata
- Islamic book recommendations
